name: Irene's Dirty Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef and pork sausage in a pan until browned, then drain off any excess drippings.
2. Add the chopped onion, bell pepper, and celery to the same pan and cook until softened.
3. Combine all cream of mushroom soup, celery soup, chicken soup, and rice in a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch dish.
4. Cover the dish tightly with foil.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 1/2 hours.
6. Serve and enjoy your delicious homemade dirty rice casserole inspired by maw-maw's recipe.
